data.content: Shipment review blocked on 2026-03-26: tagged shipment commit aea8120e78aa is not an ancestor of origin/main, and origin/main:src/components/beat-columns.tsx still imports/inserts typeColumn(), so the Queues screen on main still shows the Type column. GitHub Actions is green for origin/main commit 3f3476530e08, but that is unrelated to this beat because the beat's shipped commit is not live on main.
